goal: Implement roadmap Phases 1 through 4 as one bounded procurement-hardening round.
deliverable: Tracker reporting and smoke validation coverage
constraints: Preserve existing ledger and execution-board compatibility
Reuse the current operations and reports surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Purchases and receipts have explicit persisted objects
Operations snapshots expose actionable procurement queues
Reports expose tracker queues and lead-time trend data
Validation passes with the new flow covered
product_acceptance_criteria: Operators can see what still needs ordering, receiving, or reimbursement closure
Recommendations are concrete enough to use without becoming opaque planning logic
manual_spot_checks: Create a purchase order from the operations center and confirm it moves into receipt follow-up
Confirm replenishment cards show recommended supplier, quantity, and lead time
Open the reports page and drill into tracker rows
Check that the execution board still reflects item status transitions
completion_language_policy: Only claim completion after backend validation and frontend syntax checks pass.
delivery_truth_contract: Describe only the procurement-hardening features and verification actually shipped in this run.
inferred_assumptions: The user wants the roadmap phases implemented now rather than re-planned again.
A narrow procurement backbone is more valuable than a broad operations redesign.
